contacts_identifier_check.name: contacts_identifier_check
contacts_identifier_check.value: "contacts"."phone" IS NOT NULL OR "contacts"."cpf" IS NOT NULL OR "contacts"."email" IS NOT NULL

lead_insights_owner_check.name: lead_insights_owner_check
lead_insights_owner_check.value: ("lead_insights"."lead_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("lead_insights"."conversation_id" IS NOT NULL)
